assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 7: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — matches exactly the original in claude-md-configured.md line 16: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 8: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — new row with serena_ui as the Serena Instance column value.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 12-17 match claude-md-configured.md lines 19-25 exactly: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md uses explicit **PRESERVED** and **ADDED** labels throughout. Repository Registry section: '**PRESERVED**: trustify-backend ...' and '**ADDED**: trustify-ui ...'. Jira Configuration: '**PRESERVED**: All fields unchanged'. Code Intelligence: '**PRESERVED**: Section header...', '**PRESERVED**: Existing limitation entry for serena_backend', '**ADDED**: Limitation entry for serena_ui'. Bug Configuration: '**PRESERVED**: All fields unchanged'. Security Configuration: '**NOT ADDED**: User declined'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 2 states for serena_backend: 'Status: Already in Repository Registry -- no action needed' and for serena_ui: 'Status: NOT in Repository Registry -- new entry needed'.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 19-34 preserve the naming convention text ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.'), the serena_backend example (mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol), and the serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use'). Only new content is line 34: '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing '## Bug Configuration' section with Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), and Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks) unchanged — the skill reports Bug Configuration is up to date
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 36-40: '## Bug Configuration' with 'Bug issue type ID: 10001', 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks' — all matching the original. discovery-log.md Step 9 reports: 'Bug Configuration already exists with all three required fields populated ... Report: "Bug Configuration is up to date."'

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in since the existing CLAUDE.md has no '## Security Configuration' section, and respects the user's decline — no Security Configuration section appears in the output
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 10: 'Security Configuration does not exist in the existing CLAUDE.md. Asked user whether to enable security triage for this project. User declined. No Security Configuration section added.' claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section. changes-log.md confirms: '**NOT ADDED**: User declined when asked whether to enable security triage.'
